name: Chinese Cooking Sauce - Melinda Lee
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients and mix well.
2. When your stir-fry is nearly complete, position it towards the outer edges of the wok.
3. Add the cooking sauce to the center of the stir-fry and mix with the juices.
4. Toss the stir-fry with the sauce to ensure even coating.
